/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/MLSANDBOX.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MLSANDBOX.dir/Interfata.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MLSANDBOX.dir/Sample.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MLSANDBOX.dir/Dataset.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MLSANDBOX.dir/DatasetLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MLSANDBOX.dir/Model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MLSANDBOX.dir/LinearRegression.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MLSANDBOX.dir/KNN.cpp.o -o MLSANDBOX  /opt/homebrew/lib/libarmadillo.dylib
